series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes Fee Installment Plan Applications, Fee Installment Denial Notices to customers, Reinstatement Fee Plan orders (BMV 2091), court modification orders, and correspondence related to fee payment/installment plans for reinstatement of driving privileges, per ORC 4510.10.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current plus two (2) years from the date of expiration or cancellation of the reinstatement fee amnesty program, provided audited. ; Electronic: Retain current plus two (2) years from the date of expiration or cancellation of the reinstatement fee amnesty program, provided audited., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
